[SQL: SELECT users.id AS users_id, users.username AS users_username, users.password_hash AS users_password_hash, users.email AS users_email, users.phone AS users_phone, users.role AS users_role, users.created_at AS users_created_at, users.updated_at AS users_updated_at 
FROM users 
WHERE users.username = ? OR users.phone = ?
 LIMIT ? OFFSET ?]
